basic_details.job_title: District Collector Office Theni Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Secondary Grade Teacher
basic_details.post_name: Secondary Grade Teacher / Graduate Teacher (Social Science)
basic_details.short_information: District Collector Office Theni Secondary Grade Teacher / Graduate Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the District Collector Office Theni Secondary Grade Teacher / Graduate Teacher (Social Science) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Must have participated in TRB exam for respective post and attended certificate verification
qualification.details: Secondary Grade Teacher: Must have participated in TRB exam for Secondary Grade Teacher selection and attended certificate verification. Graduate Teacher (Social Science): Must have participated in TRB exam for Graduate Teacher selection and attended certificate verification.

salary_details.details: Secondary Grade Teacher: Rs. 12,000 Per Month Graduate Teacher (Social Science): Rs. 15,000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Collector Office Theni Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for District Collector Office Theni Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Collector Office Theni Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the District Collector Office Theni Recruitment 2026 is 14th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned office before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by District Collector Office Theni?
faq.answer: District Collector Office Theni has released a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Secondary Grade Teacher and Graduate Teacher (Social Science) in the latest recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the District Collector Office Theni Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Graduate Teacher (Social Science) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Graduate Teacher (Social Science) post is Rs. 15,000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification requires candidates to have participated in the TRB exam for the respective post and attended the certificate verification process.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the District Collector Office Theni Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection process steps?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts includes Document Verification followed by the preparation of a Merit List based on the verified documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for the Secondary Grade Teacher and Graduate Teacher (Social Science) posts is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary for the Secondary Grade Teacher post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Secondary Grade Teacher post is Rs. 12,000 per month. This is a contractual role.
